basic_details.job_title: DHS Coimbatore Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 152 Staff Nurse, MPW and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Maavatta Nalavalvu Sangam (District Health Society), Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu
basic_details.department: Health & Family Welfare Department, National Health Mission (NHM), Tamil Nadu
basic_details.post_name: Medical Officer (UHWC), Health Inspector Gr.II (UHWC), Staff Nurse (UHWC), ULB-UHN, Health Inspector Gr.II (MTM), Mid Level Health Provider (MLHP), Data Manager (IDSP), Programme cum Administrative Assistant, Cleaner, Multipurpose Hospital Worker, Dental Technician (DEIC), Optometrist (DEIC), Occupational Therapist (DEIC), Sanitary Worker (SNCU), CEmONC Security Guard
basic_details.job_type: Contractual - 11 months (not permanent, not transferable at any time)
basic_details.short_information: District Health Society Coimbatore is recruiting 152 posts across 15 categories under NHM on a contractual basis, last date 15 June 2026.

application_fee.details: The notification does not mention any application fee. Candidates are advised to check the official notification and application form available at https://coimbatore.nic.in for any fee-related updates before submitting their application.

age_limit.details: Age limit varies by post as specified in the notification. Age is as on the date of application. Age relaxation for reserved categories will be applicable as per Government of Tamil Nadu rules.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill the educational qualifications prescribed for each post as detailed below. These are contractual posts and candidates must be willing to submit an undertaking letter and an 11-month contract agreement at the time of joining.

selection_process: Selection for the contractual posts will be made as per the recommendation of the Selection Committee. The above-mentioned vacancies are subject to change. On joining
candidates must submit a self-undertaking letter and an 11-month contract agreement.

Applications received by hand or Speed Post on or before 15-06-2026 by 05:00 PM will be scrutinized. Incomplete applications and applications received without mandatory documents will be rejected outright. Applications received after the deadline will not be entertained.
Final selection will be made based on the recommendation of the Selection Committee. The number of posts mentioned is tentative and is subject to change.
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply in the prescribed application form only. Application forms can be downloaded from https://coimbatore.nic.in. The duly filled application form along with self-attested copies of all required documents and a passport-size photograph affixed on the application must be submitted either by hand or through Speed Post to the address below on or before 15-06-2026 by 05:00 PM. At the time of joining, selected candidates must submit a self-undertaking letter and an 11-month contract agreement.
Documents to be Attached with Application (self-attested copies):
Duly filled prescribed application form with passport-size photograph affixed and full address with mobile number
Proof of age (Date of Birth Certificate)
Educational qualification certificates and mark sheets
Residence proof (Ration Card / Aadhaar Card - self-attested copy)
Experience certificates (wherever required as per post eligibility)
Registration Certificate with Tamil Nadu Medical Council (for Medical Officer post)
Any other document as specified in the notification for the respective post
Applications received without the above documents, or received after the deadline, or submitted in any format other than the prescribed form, will be rejected without any communication.
Send Application to: Member Secretary / District Health Officer, Maavatta Nalavalvu Sangam (District Health Society), District Health Office, 219, Race Course Road, Coimbatore - 18.
important_instructions: These posts are purely temporary and contractual. Appointees will not be given permanent status at any time. The contractual period is 11 months. A self-undertaking letter and an 11-month contract agreement must be submitted at the time of joining. No transfer will be permitted at any point during the contract period. Applications will be accepted only by hand delivery or Speed Post - no other mode of submission is accepted. Last date for receipt of applications is 15-06-2026 by 05:00 PM. Applications received after this time will not be entertained. Application forms must be downloaded from https://coimbatore.nic.in - applications in any other format will be rejected. Incomplete applications or applications without copies of required certificates will be rejected. The above-mentioned vacancies are subject to change as per actual requirement.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for District Health Society Coimbatore NHM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications is 15 June 2026 by 05:00 PM. Applications must be submitted either by hand delivery or through Speed Post to the District Health Society Office, Coimbatore. Applications received after the deadline will not be entertained.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in District Health Society Coimbatore NHM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 152 contractual posts have been announced across 15 categories including Medical Officer (11 posts), Health Inspector Gr.II (20 posts), Staff Nurse (8 posts), ULB-UHN (85 posts), MLHP (3 posts), Data Manager (1 post), and other supporting staff positions. The number of vacancies is subject to change as per actual requirement.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for District Health Society Coimbatore NHM posts?
faq.answer: Salary varies by post: Medical Officer (UHWC) - Rs. 63,000/- per month, Data Manager (IDSP) - Rs. 25,000/-, Occupational Therapist - Rs. 23,000/-, Staff Nurse/MLHP - Rs. 21,000/-, Programme cum Administrative Assistant - Rs. 20,000/-, Health Inspector Gr.II/ULB-UHN/Optometrist - Rs. 17,500/-, Dental Technician - Rs. 17,000/-, and Cleaner/Multipurpose Hospital Worker/Sanitary Worker/Security Guard - Rs. 11,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. Are these permanent government posts?
faq.answer: No, these are purely temporary and contractual posts for a period of 11 months. Appointees will NOT be given permanent status at any time and will not be transferred during the contract period. Selected candidates must submit a self-undertaking letter and an 11-month contract agreement at the time of joining.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for District Health Society Coimbatore NHM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Age limit varies by post: Medical Officer and Occupational Therapist - less than 40 years; Data Manager - less than 40 years; Health Inspector Gr.II (UHWC), ULB-UHN, Cleaner, and other supporting staff - less than 35 years; Staff Nurse, Health Inspector Gr.II (MTM), and MLHP - less than 50 years; Programme cum Administrative Assistant - less than 45 years. Age relaxation for reserved categories applies as per Tamil Nadu Government rules.

faq.question: Q6. What educational qualification is required for Medical Officer (UHWC) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS Degree awarded by a UGC-recognised University or Institution, approved by the Medical Council of India/National Medical Commission (NMC), and must be registered with the Tamil Nadu Medical Council.

faq.question: Q7. What is the qualification required for ULB-UHN posts (85 vacancies)?
faq.answer: Candidates should have passed Higher Secondary School Examination and completed a Two-year ANM (Auxiliary Nurse Midwife) course from DPH (Directorate of Public Health) approved institutions. Age limit is less than 35 years.

faq.question: Q8. How to apply for District Health Society Coimbatore NHM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must download the prescribed application form from https://coimbatore.nic.in, fill it completely with all required details, attach self-attested copies of all certificates, affix a passport-size photograph, and submit the application either by hand or through Speed Post to: Member Secretary/District Health Officer, Maavatta Nalavalvu Sangam (District Health Society), District Health Office, 219, Race Course Road, Coimbatore - 18.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for District Health Society Coimbatore NHM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications is 15 June 2026 by 05:00 PM. Applications must be submitted either by hand delivery or through Speed Post to the District Health Society Office, Coimbatore. Applications received after the deadline will not be entertained.
